texto: If non-linear leaps in intelligence and ability are possible, why haven't these effects been observed in our schools? I believe the answer lies in the profound inertia of human thought: when an entire society believes something is impossible, it suppresses, by its very way of life, the evidence that would contradict that belief.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de John Mighton que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “If non-linear leaps in intelligence and ability are possible, why haven't these effects been obse…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre educacao, belief, inertia, com foco em inertia e science.
